repo_truth_at_creation.head: 6428f17f4fa54af28a52bd1b820207a1e56ce661
repo_truth_at_creation.latest_commit_subject: TASK-20260513: add work session Administratum ACK skeleton

purpose: Register trustworthy Sanctum actions with explicit handlers, risk levels, prechecks, receipts, and test expectations before further UI expansion.

actions.title: Refresh Current Truth State
actions.description: Refresh Sanctum operator state and current truth surfaces from local repo/runtime evidence.
actions.rollback_or_recovery: Re-run action and compare generated state/receipt pair.
actions.test_or_smoke_check: Manual click + validate SANCTUM_STATE_RECEIPT.json exists and is recent.
no_fake_green_rules: No PASS claim without state receipt
No implicit claim that Act5 execution is ready
actions.notes: Existing behavior in sanctum_v0_29_qt.py; safe refresh only.

actions.title: Run Git CLI Check
actions.description: Run Git truth check wrapper and show PASS/WARN/BLOCKED evidence to operator.
actions.rollback_or_recovery: Re-run checker and compare HEAD/verdict fields.
actions.test_or_smoke_check: Run button or CLI wrapper and confirm receipt + verdict markdown.
no_fake_green_rules: Nonzero checker exit cannot be shown as PASS
UI must display checker verdict as-is

actions.title: Test PC-VM2 Route
actions.description: Test SSH route and required remote directories without destructive mutations.
actions.rollback_or_recovery: Set route state back to unlocked and repeat test.
actions.test_or_smoke_check: Manual button click and verify receipt action=test_route.
no_fake_green_rules: Route PASS requires successful SSH command
Failure must remain visible
actions.notes: High-risk channel due to remote execution path; constrained command only.

actions.title: List VM2 Bundles
actions.description: List remote VM2 handoff bundles and annotate local status/SHA freshness.
actions.rollback_or_recovery: Re-run refresh and compare source dirs + bundle counts.
actions.test_or_smoke_check: Manual refresh and verify status line contains source dirs.
no_fake_green_rules: If remote list fails, UI must show unknown/error
No silent empty-success state
actions.notes: Read/list behavior only; does not apply bundles.

actions.title: Fetch Selected VM2 Bundle
actions.description: Fetch selected remote bundle to PC inbox with SHA verification when available.
actions.rollback_or_recovery: On SHA_FAIL remove fetched payload and retry from clean state.
actions.test_or_smoke_check: Manual fetch on PC contour; verify receipt status (PASS/PASS_WITH_WARNINGS/FAIL).
no_fake_green_rules: SHA_FAIL must remain BLOCKED
COMMAND_PREP_ONLY must not be presented as fetch success
actions.notes: On non-Windows contour returns COMMAND_PREP_ONLY by design.

actions.title: Accept VM2 Handoff (PC Intake)
actions.description: Future guarded launcher: sha256 -> scope gate -> checks -> stage allowed files -> commit/push on PC.
actions.rollback_or_recovery: Stay in NoApply mode and rollback via review-only path.
actions.test_or_smoke_check: Define integration smoke after dedicated handler is wired to registry router.
no_fake_green_rules: No apply/commit claim without proof receipts
No auto-promotion from advisory to execution
actions.notes: Registered to prevent ungated ad-hoc intake launching.

actions.title: Sync VM2 to Exact PC HEAD
actions.description: Future safe launcher for exact-head sync with dirty-state quarantine and proof receipts.
actions.rollback_or_recovery: Restore from quarantine bundle if sync gate fails.
actions.test_or_smoke_check: Blocked until handler and quarantine policy are implemented.
no_fake_green_rules: No sync PASS without before/after head proof
No direct destructive sync path
actions.notes: Explicitly registered as not implemented to avoid hidden dangerous operations.

actions.title: Open Current Task Folder
actions.description: Open selected artifact task directory in file explorer.
required_prechecks: ARTIFACTS root exists or fallback path resolved
expected_outputs: Explorer window at selected task path
actions.rollback_or_recovery: Re-open artifacts root if selected path is missing.
actions.test_or_smoke_check: Manual click and verify explorer target path.
no_fake_green_rules: If path missing, UI must show warning

actions.title: Open Advisory Buffer
actions.description: Open Astronomicon advisory buffer zone directly for review.
actions.current_ui_binding: PARTIAL: Open Astra Utility button currently opens broad ASTRONOMICON root
expected_outputs: Explorer opened at advisory buffer path
actions.rollback_or_recovery: Fallback to ASTRONOMICON root if path missing.
actions.test_or_smoke_check: Manual navigation test after dedicated binding is added.
no_fake_green_rules: Do not claim direct advisory-buffer binding until it exists
actions.notes: Registered to eliminate ambiguous operator pathing.

actions.title: Open ARC5 Prefire Zone
actions.description: Open ARC5_PREFIRE registry zone directly for operator continuity.
expected_outputs: Explorer opened at ARC5 prefire zone
actions.test_or_smoke_check: Manual navigation test after handler wiring.
no_fake_green_rules: No direct-binding claim without UI handler
actions.notes: Needed for deterministic operator navigation in Step 6+.

actions.title: Run Act5 Prefire Check Chain
actions.description: Run Step 1/2/3/4/5 checkers as one controlled verification chain.
actions.rollback_or_recovery: Re-run individual checkers for isolation when chain fails.
actions.test_or_smoke_check: Smoke defined; not run as a single wrapper in Step 6.
no_fake_green_rules: Any blocked checker keeps chain blocked
Warnings cannot be hidden as PASS
actions.notes: Registry entry prevents ad-hoc shell chains from UI.

actions.title: Register Stage Progress Report
actions.description: Future UI launcher for Step 5 report registration script.
expected_receipts: report file path in Administratum registry
actions.rollback_or_recovery: Remove invalid draft and re-register with corrected input.
actions.test_or_smoke_check: Run script with --example or validation-only mode before UI binding.
no_fake_green_rules: Progress report is claim+evidence only
Action cannot authorize continuation
actions.notes: High-risk because it writes controlled registry records.

actions.title: Issue Administratum ACK
actions.description: Future UI launcher for issuing Administratum ACK from a progress report.
required_prechecks: decision defaults to NEEDS_REVIEW unless explicit safe flags
expected_receipts: ack file path in Administratum registry
actions.rollback_or_recovery: Use NEEDS_REVIEW decision and require Owner review when uncertain.
actions.test_or_smoke_check: Run script --example and validation path before UI binding.
no_fake_green_rules: ACK is continuity permission only
ACK cannot create Owner approval
ACK cannot set READY_FOR_AGENT true
actions.notes: Safety-critical record action; kept unbound in Step 6.

actions.title: READY_FOR_AGENT Gate Check
actions.description: Read and verify READY_FOR_AGENT evidence status without mutating gate value.
required_prechecks: owner approval evidence path present for any true proposal
actions.rollback_or_recovery: Keep gate false and escalate to Owner on any evidence gap.
actions.test_or_smoke_check: Define wrapper smoke after dedicated gate-proof checker is implemented.
no_fake_green_rules: Step 6 may not set READY_FOR_AGENT true
Missing evidence keeps status blocked/unknown
actions.notes: Explicitly read-only gate action in Step 6.

global_rules: UI may request action, but action execution is allowed only through this registry contract.
Every action must have explicit handler reference, risk level, and precheck chain.
Dangerous action requires precheck plus receipt evidence before PASS claims.
No fake green: any PASS claim without evidence receipts is forbidden.
No action may claim PASS without evidence receipts.
No action may set READY_FOR_AGENT true in Step 6.
No action may execute raw advisory as execution authority.
No action may delete or quarantine files in Step 6.
No action may revive Sanctum EE / v0.30EE / R1 / R2.

risk_policy.low_risk_rule: Read-only navigation allowed with minimal checks.
risk_policy.medium_risk_rule: State/verification actions require deterministic outputs and verdict propagation.
risk_policy.high_risk_rule: Transfer/write/sync actions require explicit gates and receipts.
risk_policy.blocked_risk_rule: Blocked dangerous actions remain non-executable until owner-approved hardening.

next_steps: Bind Step 6 registered actions to explicit handler router after Owner approval
Add Playwright-level UI action trust tests after Step 7 foundation
